prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a dog barking at an empty gazebo
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: scarf with impossible timing, casserole dish, unopened letter

Cast:
- Sienna Hale | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.21 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=once left town without explaining why; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Jenna Marlowe | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=local carpenter with sad eyes | threat_aura=0.55 | space=storage unit described as old family things | secrets=knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits; had an engagement that ended under suspiciously quiet circumstances
- Tess Hawthorne | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.39 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Rachel Dane | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.69 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned; knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Gavin Winterson | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=grief counselor | threat_aura=0.89 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Rachel Pruitt | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.59 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Rachel Cross | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Rachel Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

- Act 1 Scene 1: Sienna Hale relocates to Alder Ridge after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting side room with a space heater and old family records. Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Jenna Marlowe is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Sienna Hale says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Jenna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Rachel. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Sienna. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Rachel."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

Write an expansion JSON object with exactly these keys:
- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
- dialogue_lines: array of 14 strings, each almost-human HallTime dialogue
